version_or_date: As used for the paper workflow; approximately 566,157 XML documents
public_access: Access depends on the source document collection used by the study
role_in_workflow: Context retrieval for agent-assisted hypothesis evaluation
notes: Raw corpus files and generated vector stores are not redistributed; personaai/rag/run_full_indexing.py extracts available PMID/PMCID metadata and stores it as Qdrant payload metadata attached to embedded text chunks.
